purpose: Technical MD pilot for system construction, runtime estimation, and downstream frame-processing validation. It is not a claim of converged CDK2 conformational sampling.

starting_structure.state_description: complete AlphaFold apo-like prediction aligned to the 1AQ1 docking reference frame

protonation.limitation: This is a model-based protonation assignment. Histidine and other ionizable states require later pocket-specific review.

sampling_boundary: Run one 2 ns pilot only after the system-build audit passes. Use the pilot to estimate runtime and inspect basic stability. Do not use it as evidence of converged conformational sampling or to tune on the Stage 2 test set.
